summary: Build artifacts shipped as source, sockets leak, case-sensitive model check crashes every call. Not launch-ready.
top_actions: Purge build/lib/ from git; move source to src/ and fix .gitignore so artifacts stay out
Close the OmniClient/httpx.AsyncClient with a context manager or try/finally in __main__.py
Fix validate_model's case-sensitive compare so real model IDs stop getting rejected

roaster.summary: Model check case-broke; every request dies. Timeout env crashes boot.

findings.issue: validate_model compares the requested id against /v1/models with a case-sensitive ==, but the API returns lowercased ids, so every valid model is rejected and no request ever goes through
findings.say: You ask for Kimi-K2.6, API whispers back kimi-k2.6, your == says NOPE. Congrats, the client rejects 100% of real models. Lowercase both sides or use casefold().

findings.issue: response.json() is called before checking status; on a 5xx that returns an HTML error page this throws JSONDecodeError and swallows the real upstream failure
findings.say: Server hands you an HTML tombstone, you shove it into json() and faceplant. Check the status code BEFORE you parse, or you'll debug the wrong corpse forever.

findings.issue: int(os.environ['OMNI_TIMEOUT']) runs at import time with no guard; a value like '30s' crashes the whole server on boot with a raw ValueError
findings.say: One typo in an env var and the whole server refuses to wake up. Wrap the int() or default it — don't let a stray 's' brick the launch.

mammoth.summary: Build artifacts committed; client leaked; narrow catches; wrong exception family.

findings.issue: Source files committed under build/lib/ (setuptools artifacts) while BUILD.bazel expects src/; .gitignore omits build/
findings.say: Code lives in build/lib/. That is build artifact, not source. BUILD.bazel looks for src/. .gitignore blind to build/.

findings.issue: OmniClient/httpx.AsyncClient returned by build_server is discarded and never closed, leaking TCP connections
findings.say: _omni born but never dies. Leak sockets. Need try/finally or context manager to aclose.

findings.issue: Only catches httpx.HTTPStatusError; transport errors (timeout, connect, network) leak as raw httpx exceptions instead of OmniClientError
findings.say: Catch only HTTPStatusError. Timeout and network blow up caller. Wrap all httpx.HTTPError.

findings.issue: Raises EnvironmentError (an OSError subclass) for missing config instead of ValueError or a domain-specific exception
findings.say: EnvironmentError means OS broke, not bad config. Wrong exception family. Use ValueError.

findings.issue: list_topics and validate_model silently handle polymorphic API responses without comments explaining shape variance
findings.say: API returns list or dict. No comment why. Magic parsing scares future maintainer.

findings.issue: modular_py_binary server redundantly declares requirement(mcp) already transitively provided by :modular_bos_mcp
findings.say: Binary repeats mcp dep. Library already carries it. Clean up BUILD.
